一份报纸档案中的一项偶然发现让加拿大的饮酒者垂涎于-最终-拿到一些克朗克酒的前景。
在上次饮用一个多世纪后，在互联网侦探和现实世界的酿酒商找回了一种曾经在北美广受欢迎但默默无闻的饮料后，饮料鉴赏家们很快就可以品尝到Cronk博士的复合Sarsparilla啤酒了。
2020年克隆克的复兴可以追溯到大学研究员保罗·费里(Paul Fairie)，他最近在推特上写道，他在1882年出版的《卡尔加里先驱报》(Calgary Herald)上发现了一系列离奇的广告。
“它看起来太现代了，”费里说。“与当时其他城市的广告完全不同，它们的文字要多得多，对产品的描述也要多得多。”
Fairie将这些照片发布到他的Twitter账户上，不久，“Cronk”这个词就开始在加拿大的Twitter上流行起来。
(@paulisci)1883年，一种名为Cronk&34；的饮料开始在“卡尔加里先驱报”上做广告。看看你能不能认出他们的广告。pic.twitter.com/yg3dMRDkY6。
其他人发现了更多的广告，以及出售它的华丽瓶子的图片-最终还发现了一本1860年的作品《实用收据手册》(The Handbook Of Practice Receipt)的在线副本，其中包括克朗克食谱。
这股热潮现在已经促使卡尔加里的一家啤酒厂酿造了120多年来的第一批克朗克。
“曾几何时，我希望我有能力让克朗克起死回生，”冷苑啤酒酿造商布莱克·贝尔丁(Blake Belding)说。“但后来我意识到，我确实有能力让克朗克起死回生。所以我就去订了食材。“。
贝尔丁说，食谱要求使用黄檀、莎莎草、啤酒花、洋甘菊、肉桂、生姜、绿茶和糖蜜。“我想它尝起来会像辛辣的根汁啤酒。我从来没有真正用过糖蜜，而且里面有很多生姜，所以它会起作用的。“。
第一批800升(211加仑)应该在两周内准备好-同样如此，因为贝尔丁已经被订单淹没，包括来自英国和美国的请求。
人们所知的第一次提到这种饮料是在1840年纽约州锡拉丘兹的一则广告中，广告将这种饮料的发明归功于25岁的沃伦·克罗克(Warren Cronk)。
它显然很流行。六年后，一位医生在“锡拉丘兹每日星报”(Syracuse Daily Star)上撰文称赞它“有益健康，就像禁酒一样令人向往”。
但它被认为是一种“小啤酒”--而且可能有轻微的酒精含量。贝尔丁估计，现代克朗克的酒精含量将在3-4%左右。
克朗克开始特许经营生产，到19世纪80年代末，这种饮料在美国和加拿大都可以买到。
托马斯·卡纳利(Thomas Kanley)在历史瓶子收藏家联合会(Federation Of History Bottle Collectors)的月刊2010年12月号上写道：“我不知道是否有可能追踪沃伦·克朗克(Warren Cronk)用他的‘复合莎莎帕里拉啤酒’(Compound Sarsparilla Beer)产生的所有城市和影响力。”(瓶子收藏家长期以来一直在寻找曾经出售它的手吹容器。)
尚不清楚克朗克帝国崩溃的原因，但卡纳利怀疑他是19世纪末袭击北美的一场大萧条的受害者。“汽水贸易很容易受到经济下滑的影响，这种情况经常发生。大多数人没有钱买奢侈品。汽水生意很容易陷入财务困境，“他写道。
如果历史有任何启示的话，那么这款饮料的到来恰好是夏天的最佳时机。
1848年，克利夫兰一家报纸的一则广告说：“预计这几天天气会变暖，克朗克博士美味健康的饮料需求量会很大。”
虽然多年来人们的口味发生了变化，包括在炎热的天气下偏爱更清淡、更芳香的饮料，但贝尔丁并不担心。
“我认为任何人都不会失望，”他说。“克朗克博士知道自己在做什么，如果我们按照指示去做，我们就会产生一个获胜者。”
note_en:
A chance discovery in a newspaper archive has left drinkers in  Canada and beyond salivating at the prospect of – finally – getting their hands on some Cronk.
 More than a century after it was last consumed, beverage connoisseurs will soon be able to enjoy Dr Cronk’s Compound Sarsaparilla Beer, after internet sleuths and real-world brewers recovered a drink that was once wildly popular across North America but vanished into obscurity.
 The 2020 Cronk revival can be traced back to the university researcher Paul Fairie, who recently tweeted about a series of bizarre adverts he had found in an 1882 copy of the Calgary Herald.
      “It just seemed so modern,” said Fairie. “Not at all like ads in other cities at the time, that are a lot wordier and a lot more descriptive of the product.”
 Fairie  posted the images to his Twitter account and before long, the word “Cronk” began trending on Canadian Twitter.
 (@paulisci) In 1883, a drink called "Cronk" started advertising in the Calgary Herald. See if you can spot their ads.  pic.twitter.com/yg3dMRDkY6
 Others found more adverts, as well as images as the ornate  bottles it was sold in – and eventually an online copy of  The Handbook of Practical Receipts, an 1860 work that included the Cronk recipe.
  The flurry of interest has now prompted a Calgary brewery to make the first batch of Cronk in more than 120 years.
 “Once upon a time, I would have wished that I had the power to bring Cronk back to life,” said Blake Belding, head brewer at Cold Garden. “But then I realized that I  did have the power to bring Cronk back to life. So I went ahead and ordered the ingredients.”
 The recipe calls for sassafras, sarsaparilla, hops, chamomile, cinnamon, ginger, green tea and molasses, said Belding. “I think it’s going to taste like a spicy root beer. I’ve never really used molasses and there’s a lot of ginger in there, so it’ll kick.”
 The first 800-litre (211-gallon) batch should be ready in two weeks – just as well, because Belding has been inundated with orders, including requests from the UK and US.
  The first known mention of the drink was in an 1840 advert from Syracuse, New York, which credits its invention to one Warren Cronk, 25.
 It clearly caught on. Writing in the Syracuse Daily Star six years later, a doctor praised it “as healthful, and very desirable as a Temperance drink”.
 But it was considered a “small beer” – and was probably mildly alcoholic. Belding estimates that modern Cronk will have around 3-4% alcohol content.
 Cronk began franchising out production, and by the late 1880s, the drink was available throughout the United States and Canada.
 “I don’t know if it will ever be possible to trace all the cities and the influence that Warren Cronk has had with his ‘Compound Sarsaparilla Beer’,” wrote Thomas Kanalley in the  December 2010 issue of the Federation of Historical Bottle Collectors’s monthly newsletter. (Bottle collectors have long sought out the hand-blown vessels in which it was once sold.)
 It is not clear why Cronk’s empire crumbled, but Kanalley suspects he fell victim to one of the depressions that hit North America in the late 19th century. “The soda trade was very vulnerable to downturns in the economy, which happened frequently. Most people did not have money for luxuries. A soda business could easily get in financial trouble,” he wrote.
  If history is any indication, the drink’s arrival is perfectly timed for the summer.
 “Warm weather is expected about these days, and Dr. Cronk’s delicious and healthful beverage will be in great demand,” said one  advertisement from a Cleveland newspaper in 1848.
 While tastes have changed over the years, including a shift in preference to lighter, more aromatic drinks in the heat, Belding isn’t worried.
 “I don’t think anyone’s going to be disappointed,” he said. “Dr Cronk knew what he was doing and if we follow the instructions, we’re going to come up with a winner.”
title: “克朗克统治我身边的一切”：失落的饮料在120年后复活
title_en: 'Cronk rules everything around me': lost beverage resurrected after 120 years

note: 据印度一家媒体报道，中国科技巨头独角兽字节跳动有限公司预计将损失超过60亿美元，此前该公司的三款应用程序，包括广受欢迎的视频应用TikTok，本周被印度禁止。除了TikTok，印度周一还禁止了其他58款带有中文链接的应用，包括广受欢迎的UC浏览器，这些应用从事的活动损害了印度的主权和完整、保卫印度、国家安全和公共秩序。这项禁令是在与中国军队在拉达克东部的实际控制线上持续对峙之后发布的。中国的Caixinglobal.com援引接近该公司高级管理层的消息人士的话报道，60亿美元的损失很可能超过了印度禁止的所有其他中国应用程序的损失总和。该公司表示，字节跳动(ByteDance)成为最新一家遭遇外国政府日益强烈抵制的中国本土科技公司之一，外国政府担心与中国政府之间的关系，以及对保护用户数据的担忧。报告称，印度禁止59款中国开发的应用程序是史无前例的，这对TikTok的全球扩张是一个巨大的打击，TikTok被吹捧为海外最受欢迎的中国应用程序。就中国以外的用户而言，印度是它最大的市场，这项服务在中国被称为豆音。被禁止的ByteDance应用程序是其短视频平台TikTok和Vigo Video，以及其社交网络应用Helo。腾讯的即时通讯平台微信和其他五款应用也被禁止。包括阿里巴巴集团(Alibaba Group Holding Ltd.)和百度(Baidu Inc.)在内的其他中国大型科技公司的产品也被禁止。所有59款应用程序现在都已从苹果公司(Apple Inc.)删除。以及谷歌(Google LLC)面向印度市场的应用商店。报道援引另一家出版物SensorTower的话说，TikTok今年第一季度在印度的下载量为6.11亿次，相当于该季度全球下载量的30.3%，几乎是印度2019年全年下载量的两倍。分析人士告诉财新，印度最新决定的后果可能更持久。作为对印度政府此举的回应，TikTok表示将完全遵守这一决定。ByteDance在印度雇佣了2000多名全职当地员工。
note_en: Chinese tech giant unicorn  ByteDance Ltd. is anticipating a loss of over USD 6 billion after three of its apps, including the hugely popular video app TikTok, were banned by India this week, a media report here said.    Besides Tiktok, India banned on Monday 58 other apps with Chinese links, including the popular UC Browser, for engaging in activities "prejudicial to sovereignty and integrity of India, defence of India, security of state and public order". The ban came in the wake of the ongoing stand-off along the Line of Actual control in eastern Ladakh with Chinese troops.    The USD 6 billion amount is most likely more than the combined losses for all the other Chinese apps banned by India,  China's Caixinglobal.com reported, quoting sources close to the company's senior management.    ByteDance became one of China's latest homegrown technology companies to run into growing resistance from foreign governments wary of the perceived ties to the Chinese government and concerns about protecting user data, it said.    Describing India's ban of 59 China-developed apps as unprecedented, the report said it is a huge blow to the global expansion of TikTok, which is touted as the most popular Chinese app overseas. India is its largest market in terms of users outside China, where the service is called Douyin.    The ByteDance apps banned were its short video platforms TikTok and Vigo Video, as well as its social networking app Helo.  Tencent's messaging platform WeChat and five of its other apps were also banned. Other big tech China firms, including  Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. and Baidu Inc., also had their products banned.    All the 59 apps have now been removed from  Apple Inc. and  Google LLC's app stores for the Indian market.    TikTok was downloaded in India 611 million times in this year's first quarter, equating to 30.3% of its total downloads worldwide in the quarter and nearly double the total number of India downloads for all of 2019, the report quoted another publication, SensorTower, as saying.    The consequences of India's latest decision could be more long-lasting, analysts told Caixin.    Responding to the Indian government's move, TikTok said it would fully comply with the decision. ByteDance employs over 2,000 full-time local staff in India.
title: TikTok预测印度禁令造成的损失超过60亿美元：报道
title_en: TikTok predicts over $6 bn loss from India's ban: Report
